text.title: Churn Basics Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: do not run this methodology; document skip rationale
defer; gather >= 3 complete months of cohort data first
block report; require customer + MRR + NRR together
split voluntary vs. involuntary before publication
add >= 3 leading indicators with backtested thresholds

text.example: preconditions=true → readiness gates evaluated → all_checks_pass==true → conclusion ref=monthly-not-annualized
